medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Found unresponsive at home. Last seen normal on the evening prior; minimally responsive when found by daughter. Blood sugar low upon EMS arrival. Previous diagnoses include T1DM, HTN, HLD, Multiple Myeloma, DVT on warfarin, prior right-sided CVA. Labs showed low blood sugar repeatedly and CT revealed old infarcts.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Multiple Myeloma, Type I Diabetes, DVT on warfarin, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, Anemia, history of right-sided CVA, bilateral cataracts, right-sided rotator cuff tear, osteoarthritis, peripheral neuropathy, CKD stage IV.

physical_examination.general_examination: T 99.3 BP 185/78 HR 80 SaO2 on CMV 500x14 40%. Intubated and sedated on fentanyl 100, Versed 5.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Moves all 4 extremities to noxious stimuli, does not follow commands. Pupils equally round but minimally responsive bilaterally.
